title: Blood Biomes
description: A biome-focused mod that adds new custom biomes and unique trees, enhancing the natural beauty of Minecraft
body:
![Blood Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/604f57a0e3e6e228606e3d68eae1c72593657a78_0.webp)Bloods Biomes Mod

Bloods Biomes is a biome-focused mod that introduces new, unique biomes to your Minecraft world. Each biome comes with custom trees, plants, and stunning landscapes to explore and build with.

Key Features:
Blood Forest Biome: A mystical forest filled with crimson trees and vibrant red foliage.
New Wood Types: Harvest exclusive wood from the Blood Forest to craft beautiful and unique builds.
Custom Landscapes: Explore eerie yet beautiful terrains designed to enrich y
